Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Jiangsu Jingneng Technology.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Jingneng Technology Co. represents a classic example of an asset-light systems integration and electrical installation contractor operating under a heavily inflated manufacturing scope. Although registered with a high capital of 30 million RMB (5 million paid-in), the entity functions with a micro-workforce of only 3 insured employees in 2024, operating from an office on the 15th floor of a commercial building in Gulou District. This spatial and personnel reality entirely negates its claims of manufacturing network equipment, power distribution switchgears, or plastic products. Instead, the company leverages its capital for bidding qualifications, focusing exclusively on its permitted scope: electrical installation services, software sales, and 5G/IoT systems integration. It procures necessary hardware from OEMs and subcontracts physical installation labor.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 75)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ASSET-LIGHT ENGINEERING & INTEGRATION
